lines.english: Lesson 48
lines.chinese: 第48课
lines.raw: Lesson 48 | 第48课

lines.english: The silent village
lines.chinese: 寂静的村庄
lines.raw: The silent village | 寂静的村庄

lines.english: Why was the village silent?
lines.chinese: 村庄为什么寂静？
lines.raw: Why was the village silent? | 村庄为什么寂静？

lines.english: In this much-travelled world, there are still thousands of places which are inaccessible to tourists.
lines.chinese: 在这个人们频繁往来的世界上，仍然有成千上万个旅游者望而却步的地方。
lines.raw: In this much-travelled world, there are still thousands of places which are inaccessible to tourists. | 在这个人们频繁往来的世界上，仍然有成千上万个旅游者望而却步的地方。

lines.english: We always assume that villagers in remote places are friendly and hospitable.
lines.chinese: 我们总是认为，住在偏远地方的村民是友好而殷勤好客的。
lines.raw: We always assume that villagers in remote places are friendly and hospitable. | 我们总是认为，住在偏远地方的村民是友好而殷勤好客的。

lines.english: But people who are cut off not only from foreign tourists, but even from their own countrymen can be hostile to travellers.
lines.chinese: 但是，那些不仅与外国旅游者隔绝，甚至与本国同胞也隔绝的人们，却可能对旅游者怀有敌意。
lines.raw: But people who are cut off not only from foreign tourists, but even from their own countrymen can be hostile to travellers. | 但是，那些不仅与外国旅游者隔绝，甚至与本国同胞也隔绝的人们，却可能对旅游者怀有敌意。

lines.english: Visits to really remote villages are seldom enjoyable--as my wife and I discovered during a tour through the Balkans.
lines.chinese: 访问真正偏僻的村庄，很少有什么乐趣可言——我和我妻子在巴尔干半岛旅行时就发现了这一点。
lines.raw: Visits to really remote villages are seldom enjoyable--as my wife and I discovered during a tour through the Balkans. | 访问真正偏僻的村庄，很少有什么乐趣可言——我和我妻子在巴尔干半岛旅行时就发现了这一点。

lines.english: We had spent several days in a small town and visited a number of old churches in the vicinity.
lines.chinese: 我们在一个小镇上呆了几天，参观了附近的一些古老的教堂。
lines.raw: We had spent several days in a small town and visited a number of old churches in the vicinity. | 我们在一个小镇上呆了几天，参观了附近的一些古老的教堂。

lines.english: These attracted many visitors, for they were not only of great architectural interest, but contained a large number of beautifully preserved frescoes as well.
lines.chinese: 这些教堂吸引了许多旅游者，因为它们不仅有很高的建筑价值，而且还保存了大量的制作精美的壁画。
lines.raw: These attracted many visitors, for they were not only of great architectural interest, but contained a large number of beautifully preserved frescoes as well. | 这些教堂吸引了许多旅游者，因为它们不仅有很高的建筑价值，而且还保存了大量的制作精美的壁画。

lines.english: On the day before our departure, several bus loads of tourists descended on the town.
lines.chinese: 在我们动身的前一天，好几车游客涌入了小镇。
lines.raw: On the day before our departure, several bus loads of tourists descended on the town. | 在我们动身的前一天，好几车游客涌入了小镇。

lines.english: This was more than we could bear, so we decided to spend our last day exploring the countryside.
lines.chinese: 这太让我们受不了了，于是我们决定最后一天到乡下去。
lines.raw: This was more than we could bear, so we decided to spend our last day exploring the countryside. | 这太让我们受不了了，于是我们决定最后一天到乡下去。

lines.english: Taking a path which led out of the town, we crossed a few fields until we came to a dense wood.
lines.chinese: 我们沿着一条从小镇延伸出去的小路，穿过几片田地，来到一片茂密的树林。
lines.raw: Taking a path which led out of the town, we crossed a few fields until we came to a dense wood. | 我们沿着一条从小镇延伸出去的小路，穿过几片田地，来到一片茂密的树林。

lines.english: We expected the path to end abruptly, but we found that it traced its way through the trees.
lines.chinese: 我们本以为小路会突然中断，不料它却在树林中蜿蜒而行。
lines.raw: We expected the path to end abruptly, but we found that it traced its way through the trees. | 我们本以为小路会突然中断，不料它却在树林中蜿蜒而行。

lines.english: We tramped through the wood for over two hours until we arrived at a deep stream.
lines.chinese: 我们在树林里跋涉了两个多小时，来到一条很深的溪流前。
lines.raw: We tramped through the wood for over two hours until we arrived at a deep stream. | 我们在树林里跋涉了两个多小时，来到一条很深的溪流前。

lines.english: We could see that the path continued on the other side, but we had no idea how we could get across the stream.
lines.chinese: 我们看到小路在对岸延伸，但不知道怎样才能穿过溪流。
lines.raw: We could see that the path continued on the other side, but we had no idea how we could get across the stream. | 我们看到小路在对岸延伸，但不知道怎样才能穿过溪流。

lines.english: Suddenly my wife spotted a boat moored to the bank.
lines.chinese: 突然，我妻子发现了一条系在岸边的船。
lines.raw: Suddenly my wife spotted a boat moored to the bank. | 突然，我妻子发现了一条系在岸边的船。

lines.english: In it there was a boatman fast asleep.
lines.chinese: 船上有一个船夫，睡得很熟。
lines.raw: In it there was a boatman fast asleep. | 船上有一个船夫，睡得很熟。

lines.english: We gently woke him up and asked him to ferry us to the other side.
lines.chinese: 我们轻轻地把他叫醒，请他把我们摆渡到对岸。
lines.raw: We gently woke him up and asked him to ferry us to the other side. | 我们轻轻地把他叫醒，请他把我们摆渡到对岸。

lines.english: Though he was reluctant to do so at first, we eventually persuaded him to take us.
lines.chinese: 虽然他开始不情愿，但我们最终说服他带我们过去了。
lines.raw: Though he was reluctant to do so at first, we eventually persuaded him to take us. | 虽然他开始不情愿，但我们最终说服他带我们过去了。

lines.english: The path led to a tiny village perched on the steep sides of a mountain.
lines.chinese: 小路通向一个坐落在陡峭山腰上的小村庄。
lines.raw: The path led to a tiny village perched on the steep sides of a mountain. | 小路通向一个坐落在陡峭山腰上的小村庄。

lines.english: The place consisted of a straggling unmade road which was lined on either side by small houses.
lines.chinese: 这个地方只有一条弯弯曲曲的土路，两旁是些小房子。
lines.raw: The place consisted of a straggling unmade road which was lined on either side by small houses. | 这个地方只有一条弯弯曲曲的土路，两旁是些小房子。

lines.english: Even under a clear blue sky, the village looked forbidding, as all the houses were built of grey mud bricks.
lines.chinese: 即使在晴朗的蓝天下，这个村庄看上去也令人望而生畏，因为所有的房子都是用灰色土坯建造的。
lines.raw: Even under a clear blue sky, the village looked forbidding, as all the houses were built of grey mud bricks. | 即使在晴朗的蓝天下，这个村庄看上去也令人望而生畏，因为所有的房子都是用灰色土坯建造的。

lines.english: The village seemed deserted,
lines.chinese: 村庄似乎空无一人，
lines.raw: The village seemed deserted, | 村庄似乎空无一人，

lines.english: the only sign of life being an ugly-looking black goat on a short length of rope tied to a tree in a field nearby.
lines.chinese: 唯一的生命迹象是在附近的一块田地里，有一只拴在树上的黑山羊，它被短绳系着，面目丑陋。
lines.raw: the only sign of life being an ugly-looking black goat on a short length of rope tied to a tree in a field nearby. | 唯一的生命迹象是在附近的一块田地里，有一只拴在树上的黑山羊，它被短绳系着，面目丑陋。

lines.english: Sitting down on a dilapidated wooden fence near the field, we opened a couple of tins of sardines and had a picnic lunch.
lines.chinese: 我们在田边一处破旧的木栅栏旁坐了下来，打开了两罐沙丁鱼罐头，吃起了野餐。
lines.raw: Sitting down on a dilapidated wooden fence near the field, we opened a couple of tins of sardines and had a picnic lunch. | 我们在田边一处破旧的木栅栏旁坐了下来，打开了两罐沙丁鱼罐头，吃起了野餐。

lines.english: All at once, I noticed that my wife seemed to be filled with alarm.
lines.chinese: 突然，我注意到我妻子好像惊恐万状。
lines.raw: All at once, I noticed that my wife seemed to be filled with alarm. | 突然，我注意到我妻子好像惊恐万状。

lines.english: Looking up I saw that we were surrounded by children in rags who were looking at us silently as we ate.
lines.chinese: 我抬起头，看到我们已经被一群衣衫褴褛的孩子围住了，他们一言不发地看着我们吃东西。
lines.raw: Looking up I saw that we were surrounded by children in rags who were looking at us silently as we ate. | 我抬起头，看到我们已经被一群衣衫褴褛的孩子围住了，他们一言不发地看着我们吃东西。

lines.english: We offered them food and spoke to them kindly, but they remained motionless.
lines.chinese: 我们给他们食物，和善地对他们说话，但他们仍然一动不动。
lines.raw: We offered them food and spoke to them kindly, but they remained motionless. | 我们给他们食物，和善地对他们说话，但他们仍然一动不动。

lines.english: I concluded that they were simply shy of strangers.
lines.chinese: 我断定他们只是害羞，不愿见陌生人。
lines.raw: I concluded that they were simply shy of strangers. | 我断定他们只是害羞，不愿见陌生人。

lines.english: When we later walked down the main street of the village, we were followed by a silent procession of children.
lines.chinese: 后来我们沿着村里的主要街道走去，一群默默无声的孩子跟在我们后面。
lines.raw: When we later walked down the main street of the village, we were followed by a silent procession of children. | 后来我们沿着村里的主要街道走去，一群默默无声的孩子跟在我们后面。

lines.english: The village which had seemed deserted, immediately came to life.
lines.chinese: 这个村庄，本来似乎空无一人，立刻变得活跃起来。
lines.raw: The village which had seemed deserted, immediately came to life. | 这个村庄，本来似乎空无一人，立刻变得活跃起来。

lines.english: Faces appeared at windows.
lines.chinese: 窗户里出现了脸庞。
lines.raw: Faces appeared at windows. | 窗户里出现了脸庞。

lines.english: Men in shirt sleeves stood outside their houses and glared at us.
lines.chinese: 穿着衬衫的男人站在屋外，怒视着我们。
lines.raw: Men in shirt sleeves stood outside their houses and glared at us. | 穿着衬衫的男人站在屋外，怒视着我们。

lines.english: Old women in black shawls peered at us from doorways.
lines.chinese: 披着黑色披肩的老妇人从门道里窥视着我们。
lines.raw: Old women in black shawls peered at us from doorways. | 披着黑色披肩的老妇人从门道里窥视着我们。

lines.english: The most frightening thing of all was that not a sound could be heard.
lines.chinese: 最令人恐惧的是，一点声音都听不到。
lines.raw: The most frightening thing of all was that not a sound could be heard. | 最令人恐惧的是，一点声音都听不到。

lines.english: There was no doubt that we were unwelcome visitors.
lines.chinese: 毫无疑问，我们是不受欢迎的客人。
lines.raw: There was no doubt that we were unwelcome visitors. | 毫无疑问，我们是不受欢迎的客人。

lines.english: We needed no further warning.
lines.chinese: 我们不再需要更多的警告了。
lines.raw: We needed no further warning. | 我们不再需要更多的警告了。

lines.english: Turning back down the main street,
lines.chinese: 我们转身沿着主要街道往回走，
lines.raw: Turning back down the main street, | 我们转身沿着主要街道往回走，

lines.english: we quickened our pace and made our way rapidly towards the stream where we hoped the boatman was waiting.
lines.chinese: 加快了脚步，迅速朝小溪走去，我们希望船夫还在那里等着。
lines.raw: we quickened our pace and made our way rapidly towards the stream where we hoped the boatman was waiting. | 加快了脚步，迅速朝小溪走去，我们希望船夫还在那里等着。
